metadata.author: Paul
metadata.subject: An Illustration of the Believers' Equal Status in the New Man.

1: For perhaps he was separated from you for an hour for this purpose, that you might fully possess him forever,
No longer as a slave, but more than a slave, a beloved brother, especially to me, but how much more to you, both in the flesh and in the Lord.

16.text: In the New Man, all social distinctions and classes are abolished. A runaway slave and his master become equal brothers in the Body of Christ.
